title: noccaea alpestris subsp. sylvium
intro: Noccaea alpestris subsp. sylvium, also known as alpine rockcress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Noccaea alpestris subsp. sylvium include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
